home.designQuote: "Design is not decoration — it is the language space speaks."
home.approachParagraph: Somaz Studio brings architecture, interiors, and visualization into one clear process, so each project moves forward with better design and better presentation.
home.step01Desc: We start by understanding the project, its priorities, and the kind of result it needs.
home.step02Desc: Somaz leads the concept, interiors, visualization, and technical package with a documented process built for remote collaboration.
home.step03Desc: We deliver material that is ready to present, coordinate, or keep developing depending on the stage of the project.

services.metaTitle: Architecture, Interiors & Visualization Services — Miami and Argentina
services.metaDesc: Architecture, interior design, visualization, conceptual design, and consulting for residential, commercial, and hospitality projects.
services.faq1Q: How long does a 3D visualization take?
services.faq1A: Delivery depends on the package. Essential (1 view) takes 48–72 hours. Standard (3 views) takes 5–7 business days. Premium (5+ views) is scoped per project.
services.faq2Q: Do you work with clients outside Miami?
services.faq2A: Yes — we are a remote-first studio and work with clients across the US, Latin America, and internationally. All deliveries are digital.
services.faq3Q: What files do I need to provide?
services.faq3A: For 3D visualization we need floor plans (PDF or CAD) and elevation drawings if available. For interior design, detailed measurements or a site visit are also helpful.
services.faq4Q: Can I request changes after delivery?
services.faq4A: Yes. All packages include at least one round of revisions. Additional rounds require a fee adjustment or change order depending on scope.

about.intro: Somaz Studio brings architecture, interiors, and visualization together in a small, carefully run studio focused on spatial quality.
about.quote: "Design is not decoration — it is the language space speaks."
about.diff1Desc: Our design approach combines technical precision with a deep understanding of how space, culture, and light shape the experience of living.
about.diff2Desc: We carry the project from the first idea to the final presentation, taking care of both the concept and the way it is communicated.
about.diff3Desc: Every stage is structured so the client understands what is being defined, what is being delivered, and what comes next.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1body: Somaz Studio LLC ("Somaz Studio", "we", "us") is an architect-led studio based in Miami, FL, operating globally. We provide architecture, interiors, visualization, consulting, and coordination with local partners when a jurisdiction requires sign-off, adaptation, or submission. You can reach us at hola@somazstudio.com.
privacy.s2intro: We collect information you provide directly when you:
privacy.s2li1: Submit our contact form (name, email, phone, message, and, if you choose to share them, project location or project type)
privacy.s2li2: Browse our site, which uses privacy-friendly aggregate analytics to measure usage and performance
privacy.s2outro: We also collect anonymous usage data through Vercel Analytics, which measures page views and performance metrics without identifying individual visitors.
privacy.s3li1: To respond to project inquiries and communicate about potential engagements
privacy.s3li2: To improve our website and services through aggregate analytics
privacy.s3li3: To maintain basic security and prevent form abuse through reasonable technical controls
privacy.s3outro: We do not use your information for automated decision-making or profiling.
privacy.s4body: Your data is stored securely in Supabase (a PostgreSQL-based cloud database) hosted on AWS infrastructure in the United States. Data is protected with row-level security and encrypted at rest and in transit.
privacy.s5body: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for their marketing purposes. We may share data only with providers necessary to operate our business (Supabase for storage, Resend for transactional email, Vercel for hosting and analytics) and, when needed to assess or execute a project, with local partners or independent consultants under the relevant contractual workflow.
privacy.s6intro: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacy.s6li1: Access the personal information we hold about you
privacy.s6li2: Request correction or deletion of your data
privacy.s6li3: Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority (for EU residents)
privacy.s6li4: Request additional information about how we process your data and when it may be shared for project delivery
privacy.s6outro: To exercise any of these rights, email us at hola@somazstudio.com.
privacy.s7body: We do not use tracking cookies or advertising cookies. Vercel Analytics uses a privacy-friendly approach that does not rely on cookies to identify visitors.
privacy.s8body: Contact form submissions are retained for up to 2 years to support ongoing business relationships.
privacy.s9body: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be noted with an updated date at the top of this page. Continued use of our website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s10body: Questions about this policy? Email hola@somazstudio.com or write to: Somaz Studio LLC, Miami, FL, United States.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDesc: Terms of Service for Somaz Studio.
terms.s1body: Somaz Studio LLC ("we," "us," or "the Studio") provides architecture, interiors, visualization, consulting, and design coordination services. In Argentina, some projects may include broader architectural scope subject to actual licensure and applicable jurisdiction. In Florida, Miami, and international markets, when a project requires sign-off, regulatory adaptation, or local submission, Somaz coordinates with licensed or registered local partners. By engaging our services or submitting a project inquiry, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.s2body: Each project is governed by a separate written agreement or proposal specifying scope, deliverables, timeline, and fees. These Terms supplement — and do not replace — any project-specific agreement. In case of conflict, the project agreement controls.
terms.s3body: All designs, renderings, drawings, and creative works produced by Somaz Studio remain the intellectual property of Somaz Studio until full payment is received. Upon payment, clients receive a license to use the deliverables as specified in the project agreement. We retain the right to display completed work in our portfolio unless otherwise agreed in writing.
terms.s4body: Payment terms are specified in each project agreement. A deposit is typically required before work begins. Small projects are usually structured 50/50 and phased projects 40/40/20. Local partner fees, filings, consultants, and third-party costs are excluded unless expressly included in writing. Unpaid balances may result in work being paused or deliverables withheld until payment is received.
terms.s5body: Each proposal includes a defined number of revision rounds. Additional revisions, scope changes, jurisdiction changes, late partner involvement, or new resubmissions beyond the original scope require a change order or fee adjustment agreed in writing before work proceeds.
terms.s6body: Unless a project agreement expressly states otherwise within a properly enabled jurisdiction, Somaz does not act as the architect-of-record, local signatory, or primary submission authority outside its contracted scope. In the US and international markets, documents may require review, adaptation, sign-off, and submission by a licensed local professional. Visualization or consulting deliverables are not construction documents unless expressly stated and completed under the correct jurisdictional workflow. We are not liable for construction use, submission, or decisions taken from unfinished documents or documents not reviewed by the competent professional. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the fees paid for the specific project giving rise to the claim, except where applicable law prevents that limitation.
terms.s7body: We treat all client project information as confidential and will not disclose it to third parties without your consent, except as required by law or when sharing is necessary with local partners, consultants, or providers within the relevant contractual workflow. We may also operate under NDA where required.
terms.s8body: These Terms operate as the site's general framework and are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, United States. However, each project may operate under a specific contractual package depending on its jurisdiction profile (`Florida / International` or `Argentina`). In case of conflict, the applicable project agreement controls.
terms.s9body: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at hola@somazstudio.com.
